bird.name: 槲鸫
bird.summary: 槲鸫（学名：Turdus viscivorus）属於鸫科鸫属，是一种常见雀鸟，广泛分布於欧洲、非洲北部、北亚中部、中亚及中国西部的疏林和耕地，其中中国境内仅有新疆西南部、西北部天山分布有T. v.

locations.name: 中东
locations.summary: 中東（英語：Middle East，阿拉伯語：الشرق الأوسط，希伯來語：המזרח התיכון）是一個地理區域，和西亞大致重疊，並包含部分北非地區，但不包含外高加索地區，也是非洲與歐亞大陸的亞洲區。具体是指地中海東部與南部區域…

locations.name: 亚速尔群岛
locations.summary: 亚速尔（葡萄牙語：Açores），正式名称為亞速爾自治區（Região Autónoma dos Açores），是位於北大西洋中央的一個群島，葡萄牙两个自治区之一，其行政首府為聖米格爾島上的蓬塔德爾加達。該群島由九個主要島嶼組成，東距葡…

locations.name: 克里特岛
locations.summary: 克里特岛（希臘語：Κρήτη，羅馬化：Kriti / Crete；古希臘語：Κρήτη，羅馬化：Krḗtē；土耳其語：Girit；聖書體：𓎡𓆑𓍘𓅱𓈉，轉寫：keftiu），舊譯革哩底，聖經中又稱迦斐托（古希伯來文：כפתור，轉寫：cap…

relations.subject: 槲鸫
relations.evidence: Scandinavian and Russian birds start moving south from mid-September onwards, most birds wintering in Europe, western Turkey and the Middle East

relations.subject: 槲鸫
relations.evidence: Migration may be by day or night, and typically involves individuals or small groups. Vagrant birds have occurred in the Azores, China, Crete, Faroe Islands, Iceland, Japan, Oman, Saudi Arabia, Sikkim and the United Arab Emirates. In the winter 2017/2018 the first record of a mistle thrush in North America was at Miramichi in New Brunswick, found on 9 December 2017 and remaining until 24 March 2018. The mistle thrush is found in a wide range of habitats containing trees, including forests, plantations, hedges and town parks
